name: lodestar
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Lodestar instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Lodestar tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Lodestar through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Lodestar Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Lodestar only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
